questions: how to be a good communicator
answers: Listen more, be clear, eye contact, practice public speaking.
To speak confidently: slow down, make eye contact, listen actively, and practice in front of a mirror or record yourself.
Public speaking gets better with practice. Join a group like Toastmasters, prepare well, and remember — the audience wants you to succeed.
Communication tips: be concise, listen twice as much as you speak, maintain eye contact, and don't be afraid of short pauses.
